prompt_text:
### Demographics: 67-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.8 kg; Height 173.2 cm; BMI 19.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.9%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.6%), FPG (12 months ago 260mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 310mg/dL; 3 months ago 298mg/dL; current 260mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.1kg; 9 months ago 57.2kg; 6 months ago 57.9kg; 3 months ago 56.9kg; current 58.8kg), Height (12 months ago 173.2cm; 9 months ago 173.2cm; 6 months ago 173.2cm; 3 months ago 173.2cm; current 173.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 87U/L; 6 months ago 88U/L; 3 months ago 86U/L; current 92U/L), AST (12 months ago 90U/L; 9 months ago 91U/L; 6 months ago 93U/L; 3 months ago 100U/L; current 98U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 191mg/g; 9 months ago 279mg/g; 6 months ago 285mg/g; 3 months ago 313mg/g; current 293mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 188mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 168mg/dL; 3 months ago 184mg/dL; current 176mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.6g/dL; 9 months ago 10.7g/dL; 6 months ago 10.7g/dL; 3 months ago 11.3g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.35 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
